info.english_meaning: to laughto smileto joke to ridicule

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'avasarAdyanapekzo hAso'pahAso Bavati tvayA yadapahAsyaM me SrutvA' (rA॰2.27.2)
'avahAsaM tato muktvA rAvaRo vAkyamabravIt' (rA0 7188) avahAsaH saninda upahAsaH
'kaTaM nu sarvalokasya nAvahAsyA Bavemahi' (BA0 droRa0 753) avahAsyAH=upahAsayogyAH antarlInamavahasya ihAvahAsaH smitaparyAyaH sArTako'vaSabdaH
'kimiti vizIdati roditi vikalA vihasati yuvatisaBA tava sakalA' (gIta0 9) vihasati upahasati virudDo hAso vihAsaH
'kiM cid vihasyArTapatiM baBAze' (raGu0 246) vihasya smitaM kftvA iha viSabda IzadarTe
'parasya lAGavamApAdayituM yo hAsaH sa upahAsaH amaragurumapi prajYayopahasadBiH' (kAda0) atiSayAnErityupacarito'rTaH
